title: 2pcs Bride and Groom Wedding Hangers, Wooden Elegant Bridal Dress Hanger with Bow & Bow Tie Wedding Dress Accessory for Bridal Party & Shower Supplies
features: Product List: You will receive 2 pieces of white and brown bridal dress hangers, decorated with bows and bow ties, perfect for wedding attire, adding a touch of sophistication to your big day.
Product Materials: The bridal dress hangers are made of good-quality wooden, polyester, and equipped with sturdy metal hooks with a smooth surface that will not harm your delicate clothing fabrics.

Excellent Design: Each hanger is engraved with the words "Bride" and "Groom", highlighting personalization. There is a non-slip design on both sides, so there is no need to worry about the problem of clothing slipping off.

Wide Application: The bridal dress hanger can not only hang wedding dresses or suits, but also be used as exquisite props for bridal portraits and wedding photography. The classic design is suitable for any wedding theme.
Ideal Gift: The bridal dress hangers are very suitable as gifts for newlyweds, which are both useful and meaningful. They are precious souvenirs of the wedding and let them recall the good times.
description: Specification: Color: brown, white Material: Wooden, iron, polyester Product Size: as shown in the picture Package details: 2 x bridal dress hangers Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between different monitors, there may be a slight color difference existed.
